channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania develops national guidelines for Point-of-Care Ultrasound use in healthcare
item.description: The Ministry of Health, in partnership with the University of Dodoma (UDOM), has convened health sector stakeholders to prepare national guidelines for the use of Point-of-Care Ultrasound (POCUS). The...

item.title: Guide to Boarding Matatus from Nairobi to Ngong Town
item.description: Ngong town, about 23 km from Nairobi CBD, is easily accessible via several matatu stages. Major boarding points include Railways Bus Station on Haile Selassie Avenue, Kencom House along Moi Avenue, To...

item.title: President Marcos orders police protection for girl reporting local official's abuses
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has taken immediate action after receiving a letter from an 11-year-old girl from Camarines Sur detailing alleged harassment and abuse by a barangay official. The letter...

item.title: First Nations Advocate Requests Criminal Investigation into FSIN Financial Audit
item.description: Rob Louie, founder and president of the Band Member Alliance and Advocacy Association of Canada (BMAAAC), has requested that police investigate the Federation of Sovereign Indigenous Nations (FSIN) fo...

item.title: BoT launches government-backed credit guarantee to expand access to loans
item.description: Bank of Tanzania (BoT) imeweka mipango ya kuanzisha Credit Guarantee Corporation (CGC) kwa ajili ya benki za biashara. Lengo la mpango huu ni kurahisisha upatikanaji wa fedha kwa watu binafsi na biash...

item.title: Apple TV+ to release new adaptation of ‘Cape Fear’ starring Javier Bardem, Patrick Wilson, and Amy Adams on June 5
item.description: A new television adaptation of Martin Scorsese’s 1991 thriller ‘Cape Fear’ is set to premiere on Apple TV+ on June 5. The series is created by Nick Antosca, known for his psychological horror works, a...

item.title: Australians face $2 billion in scam losses as anti-scam legislation awaits implementation
item.description: Australians lost more than A$2 billion to scams in 2025, marking a 7.8% increase from 2024, according to the Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC). The main types of scams included inv...

item.title: Jordan And Nigeria Super Eagles Play Out 2-2 Friendly Draw
item.description: Nigeria wrap up their March international fixtures with a hard-fought 2-2 draw against Jordan, who are heading to the World Cup and currently ranked 64th globally. Jordan take early lead in the 17th m...

item.title: KSE-100 recovers strongly following previous day’s steep decline
item.description: After a steep fall driven by war-related fears, the Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) rebounded sharply on Tuesday as the benchmark KSE-100 index surged by 1,900.34 points, closing at 148,743.31. This rep...

item.title: The Overlooked Environmental Impact of Conflict and Climate Change
item.description: The article explores the interplay between war, environmental degradation, and climate change, emphasizing how long-term ecological consequences are often neglected during post-war reconstruction. The...

item.title: Derby man charged following incident injuring seven pedestrians
item.description: A 36-year-old man, Sandhu Ponnachan from Alvaston, Derby, has been formally charged following a serious incident in Derby city centre on Saturday evening. Ponnachan is facing six counts of grievous bo...

item.title: How Tanzanian Content Creators Adapt and Thrive in the Digital Era
item.description: In Tanzania, many digital creators face a reality far different from the glamour often shown online. Growth is rarely instant; it demands patience, resilience, and constant reinvention. Kiredio, whose...

item.title: Police respond to anti-social behaviour as youths cause disruption in Clapham high street
item.description: On Tuesday afternoon, Clapham high street in south London was once again the scene of disorder as groups of teenagers, influenced by a TikTok trend, congregated in large numbers. Families reportedly h...

item.title: Understanding the Vital Role of Prosecutors in Criminal Cases
item.description: The Rappler Newsbreak episode titled 'Order in the Court: Are you curious what prosecutors do?' explains the key role prosecutors play within the Philippine justice system. Prosecutors serve as the fi...

item.title: Interior Ministry orders Nadra to trace and remove illegally registered foreign citizens
item.description: On March 31, 2026, Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi visited the Nadra headquarters in Islamabad and directed the National Database and Registration Authority to immediately identify and take action agai...

item.title: Election tribunal upholds Attaullah Tarar’s victory from NA-127
item.description: LAHORE: The election tribunal on Tuesday has officially dismissed the petition challenging Information Minister Attaullah Tarar’s win from NA-127 in the 2024 general elections, terming it non-maintain...

item.title: Violence Erupts in Eastern Cape Over Alleged Nigerian King Installation
item.description: Violence broke out in KuGompo City, Eastern Cape, South Africa, following the alleged coronation of Nigerian national Solomon Eziko as 'Igwe Ndigbo'. Videos of the ceremony circulated widely, sparking...

item.title: Israel passes death penalty bill for Palestinians amid international criticism
item.description: The United States has stated that it respects Israel’s sovereign right to legislate its own laws after the Israeli parliament passed a bill introducing the death penalty for Palestinians convicted of ...

item.title: Glasgow man ordered to repay £46,000 after £1m cocaine pursuit conviction
item.description: A personal trainer from Glasgow, William Paterson, aged 37, has been ordered by the High Court in Edinburgh to repay £46,370 under the Proceeds of Crime Act, following his conviction for drug traffick...

item.title: Upcoming Film Releases Highlight Diverse Range of Content Across Streaming Platforms
item.description: A comprehensive overview of upcoming film releases across various streaming platforms has been compiled, showcasing the diverse range of content available to audiences. The article details new additio...
